summary: TWO_COLUMN: complex plane with z = r·e^(iθ) drawn as arrow + dot + radius label + angle arc, all redrawn via always_redraw. Two ValueTrackers r and θ, plus a persistent yellow trail. Tour: first θ sweeps 2π at fixed r=2 (traces circle), then r sweeps 0.4→2.8 at fixed θ=π/3 (traces ray). Right column shows live r, θ in deg/rad, Re(z), Im(z), and z numerically.
